title: Waterproof Neoprene Suede Travel Makeup Bag Cosmetic Pouch for Women
seoTitle: Custom Logo Neoprene Makeup Bag Wholesale
description:
Durable Water Resistant Neoprene Material
Premium thick neoprene fabric features excellent waterproof and leak-proof performance. Spilled liquid foundation, toner or perfume will not soak through the bag, just wipe it with a damp cloth for quick cleaning. The padded inner layer offers full protection to fragile glass perfume bottles, makeup palettes and delicate makeup brushes against collision and scratches.
Minimalist Stylish Luxury Design
Classic solid brown appearance with subtle embossed LUNORA leaf logo creates a sophisticated, low-luxury vibe. No complicated extra decorations, this versatile cosmetic pouch fits casual, office and travel scenarios, great for beauty lovers who pursue texture and simplicity.
Perfect Gift Choice for Women
This aesthetic makeup organizer is a thoughtful gift option for birthdays, Valentine’s Day, Christmas, bridesmaid gifts and corporate beauty giveaways. It comes with a delicate texture that stands out from ordinary cosmetic bags, bringing surprise to every lady who loves makeup.
seoDescription: Custom logo suede neoprene makeup bag wholesale. Waterproof lightweight travel cosmetic pouch manufacturer, support OEM private label bulk orders for beauty retailers.
